who: logistics managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-50 shipments/month
offer: For logistics managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-50 shipments/month, inefficient supply chain management causes delayed shipments. We provide predictive insights and optimization recommendations instead of manual tracking and analysis of supply chain data.
problem: inefficient supply chain management leading to delayed shipments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about logistics challenges
Direct message logistics managers with demo video links
Participate in community forums for sharing logistics tools
try_it: Let users try real-time data monitoring and basic predictive analytics on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for ease
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
